title: CHIP Token Explodes 130% in 24 Hours, Reaches Top 150 Market Cap Rankings
excerpt: CHIP cryptocurrency has surged an impressive 130.12% in the past 24 hours, pushing its price to $0.132357 and securing a spot in the top 150 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization. The dramatic price movement has caught the attention of traders as CHIP establishes itself among notable altcoin performers.
